texto: Of course, in my mind, violence would have been better, but since that wasn’t an option, I decided to play along. “It’s okay, handsome. I’ve only been here a few minutes. I’d like to introduce you to Dick.”“No, it’s…” Richard tried to correct me only to be interrupted by Drew.“Nice to meet you, Dick,” Drew retorted.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeanne McDonald: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “Of course, in my mind, violence would have been better, but since that wasn’t an option, I decide…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, drama, humor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e love.
